title: cyperus scott-elliotii
intro: Cyperus scott-elliotii, also known as Scott-Elliot's flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus scott-elliotii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
